message:
test(pipeline): add pipeline cancel, status, state update, dry run, and list tests

Expand robot_test.go with comprehensive pipeline lifecycle coverage:

- TestCancelPipeline_Running: verify cancelFn invocation, status transition,
  and FinishedAt timestamp set
- TestCancelPipeline_NotFound: no panic on nonexistent run ID
- TestCancelPipeline_NilFuncs: no panic with nil cancelFn and executor
- TestPrintPipelineCancel_RunningPipeline: JSON output structure with
  success, status, and runID fields
- TestPrintPipelineStatus_FinishedPipeline: finished_at, duration_ms > 0,
  progress at 100%
- TestUpdatePipelineFromState_NilState: no panic, status unchanged
- TestUpdatePipelineFromState_NonExistent: no panic on missing pipeline
- TestUpdatePipelineFromState_TotalPreservation: original total preserved
  when state has fewer steps, correct completed/percent calculation
- TestUpdatePipelineFromState_WithErrors: last error message extraction,
  FinishedAt propagation from state
- TestPrintPipelineRun_DryRun: YAML workflow parsing, dry run output with
  success/workflowID/status fields
- TestPrintPipelineList_StatusCounts: 4 pipelines (running/completed/failed/
  cancelled), AgentHints.Summary contains "1 running"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
